Cleancore is a visual aesthetic centered around themes of extreme cleanliness, sanitation, and refreshing purity, often utilizing a color palette of bright whites, cool blues, and soft teals. It draws heavy inspiration from objects like sparkling water bottles, sterile bathroom tiles, bubbling soaps, and fresh laundry to evoke a sense of nostalgic safety and crystalline clarity. The imagery often feels surreal or "dreamcore-adjacent," capturing a quiet, sanitized world that feels both comforting
